name: Russian Train Trip 2
short_description: Journey on a passenger train in Russia. You play as a first-person character, you have to travel by train for 7 days to Vladivostok. Look out the window, listen to the radio, and move around the carriage.
detailed_description:
Trans-Siberian Express


Russian Train Trip 3


Russian Train Trip


Train Travel Simulator


Chinese Train Trip


About the Game

In the second part of Russian Train Trip 2 you will travel to Vladivostok, overcoming vast distances on a passenger train in a compartment car. Look out the window, listen to the radio, move around the carriage. You are waiting for a fascinating journey.

On the way you can visit 8 major railway stations:
- Moscow (Yaroslavl).
- Yekaterinburg
- Tyumen
- Krasnoyarsk
- Irkutsk
- Ulan-Ude
- Khabarovsk
- Vladivostok

supported_languages:
English, Russian*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
